{"problem_standardized_math":"For the constrained optimization problem\n\\[\n\\min \\; x_1+x_2 \\qquad \\text{subject to } x_1^2+x_2^2-2=0,\n\\tag{17.3}\n\\]\nminimize the quadratic penalty function for \\(\\mu_k=1,10,100,1000\\) using an unconstrained minimization algorithm. Set \\(\\tau_k=1/\\mu_k\\) in Framework 17.1, and for each minimization choose the starting point \\(x_{k+1}^s\\) to be the solution obtained for the previous value of the penalty parameter. Report the approximate solution for each penalty function."}
